case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO VS. PUAI MOSE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO AS TO DEFENDANT MOSE, PUAI DOES 1-10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2008

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-18-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2008 CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) OR DISMISSAL. MAY-28-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-09-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-18-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
